brand.name: Diti Engineers
brand.tagline: Precision castings for motors, pumps, automotive

ci.title: Cast iron, production-ready
ci.body: Motor bodies, pump housings and industrial components in consistent CI grades — machined, inspected and shipped for repeat OEM volumes.

aluminum.title: Lightweight, dimensionally tight
aluminum.body: High-pressure aluminum die cast parts for motor enclosures, auto components and precision assemblies — from prototype to full production runs.

die.title: Complex geometry, one roof
die.body: Pressure die casting for intricate aluminum parts with tight tolerances — reducing assembly steps and lead time for OEM engineering teams.

brands.headlineLine2: Built for motors, pumps and automotive.

card1.quote: Consistent material quality and predictable lead times — the two things that actually matter when you're scaling a motor line.
card1.author: Procurement Manager

card2.quote: We replaced two job-shop suppliers with Diti Engineers. Single source for CI and aluminum, fewer late shipments.
card2.author: Purchase Head

card3.quote: Repeat CI motor body runs ship on schedule. One Rajkot partner covers casting through dispatch.
card3.author: Plant Manager

card4.quote: Pump housings and impeller castings arrive dimensionally stable — our assembly line stays predictable.
card4.author: Operations Lead

card5.quote: Automotive casting programs need tight tolerances. Diti delivers aluminum and pressure die from one roof.
card5.author: Sourcing Manager

card6.quote: GST-registered invoicing and export documentation from day one — finance cleared our vendor onboarding fast.
card6.author: Finance Controller

card7.quote: Found Diti on IndiaMART, stayed for 13+ years of repeat orders. Direct manufacturer, no trading markup.
card7.author: Vendor Development

card8.quote: In-house CI and aluminum under one quality system — fewer audits, fewer surprises on the floor.
card8.author: Quality Head

card9.quote: Submitted a drawing on Monday, had price guidance by Tuesday. That speed wins programs for us.
card9.author: Project Engineer

applications.headlineLine2: with a casting partner built for OEM programs
applications.subtitle: From repeat production volumes to new part development — one Rajkot factory covering CI, aluminum and pressure die under a single quality system.

oem.title: Repeat OEM production programs
oem.body: Consistent material grades, predictable lead times and a single source for CI and aluminum — built for procurement teams running motor, pump and auto lines.

production.title: Prototype to production volumes
production.body: Every new part can start with Diti's full material range. From first samples to 10,000+ unit runs — export-ready documentation and GST-registered invoicing from day one.

products.subtitle: From motor bodies to pump parts and auto components — precision castings across CI, aluminum and pressure die.

aluminum-motor-body-parts.description: Aluminum cast motor body and housing components.
